meaning: adj.不怀疑的,无疑虑的,信任的
examples: She threw a surprise party for her unsuspecting husband.
She fixes her steel-blue eyes on an unsuspecting local official.
It was easy work, they said, checking out unsuspecting law students.
How many iPhones will be purloined from around unsuspecting necks before this pouch concept gets canned?
Even at 73, he delighted in silently setting them off as an unsuspecting victim sat nearby.
